summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No shared canonical was invented. All listed PRs are open draft contributor PRs; close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are blocked by job policy, so the safe outcome is to keep them open for their own review/proof paths. Two hydrated linked security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling only.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope and must route to central OpenClaw security handling.
